advancements.elementmagicboss.root.title: Element Magic Boss
advancements.elementmagicboss.root.descr: Start of the Great Wizard's challenge
advancements.elementmagicboss.surpassed_: You defeated the Great Wizard Element!
Instead of EXP or Lv, you gained Love (Ai).
Some killing is unavoidable to survive.
It's very sad to kill mobs without understanding why.
You were killing mobs intentionally, weren't you?
Maybe some killings were just self-defense.
I didn't see it, so I don't know.
Maybe you're buying and selling drop items.
You're a heartless and cruel player.
A merciless person who kills for experience points and drops.
birds are singing, flowers are blooming...
on days like these, kids like you....
S h o u l d b e b u r n i n g i n h e l l.
item.elementmagicboss.angel_ring.descrip: A holy ring that grants flight and regeneration.
spell.elementmagicboss.storm_barrage.gui: Call down a rapid barrage of lightning around yourself.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.storm_barr: %1$s was overwhelmed by %2$s's storm barrage using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.danmaku_shot.guid: Fire a random burst of piercing evocation shots that ricochet off blocks.
spell.elementmagicboss.blazing_star.guid: Call down stars that burst into 20 ender shots when they hit a block or target.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.blazing_st: %1$s was annihilated by %2$s's blazing star using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.sun_storm.guide: Summon a storm of holy sunbeams that rain down all around you.
%1$s was incinerated by %2$s's sun storm using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.blood_rain.guide: Rain a torrent of blood needles from the sky. Heals you for 50% of damage dealt.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.blood_rain: %1$s was showered in %2$s's blood rain using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.true_blazing_stor: An enhanced Blaze Storm. Each burst unleashes 20 fireballs that set enemies ablaze.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_blazi: %1$s was incinerated by %2$s's true blaze storm
%1$s was incinerated by %2$s's true blaze storm using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.true_arrow_volley: An enhanced Arrow Volley that drops 10 times as many small magic arrows into a tighter area. Each arrow deals 5x the normal version's damage and also scales with spell level.
spell.elementmagicboss.flying_blood_slas: Unleash a 15second storm of blood slashes in all directions.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.flying_blo: %1$s was carved by %2$s's flying blood slash
%1$s was carved by %2$s's flying blood slash using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.sea_of_fire.guide: Hurl a massive magma bomb that explodes into a fire field 3x the size and duration of a Magma Bomb.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.sea_of_fir: %1$s was consumed by %2$s's sea of fire
%1$s was consumed by %2$s's sea of fire using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.raise_danmaku.gui: Launch 40 fiery danmaku bullets into the air. They arc under gravity, pierce through entities, and ricochet off blocks.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.raise_danm: %1$s was scorched by %2$s's raise danmaku using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.hyahha_bakka.guid: Target a location and unleash 200 colorful fireworks that explode across a 10-block radius.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.hyahha_bak: %1$s was blown apart by %2$s's hundred burst flowers
%1$s was blown apart by %2$s's hundred burst flowers using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.ken_no_mai.guide: Grants a buff that surrounds you with 200 spinning iron swords. Swords follow your movement and strike enemies every tick while the effect lasts.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.ken_no_mai: %1$s was cut down by %2$s's sword dance
%1$s was cut down by %2$s's sword dance using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.baika.guide: Multiplies the items in your main hand and off hand, ignoring stack limits. Higher levels multiply further (Lv1=x2, Lv2=x3...).
spell.elementmagicboss.true_counterspell: An enhanced Counterspell. Cancels the target's casting and removes ALL active effects, not just magical ones.
spell.elementmagicboss.danmaku_breath.gu: Breathe a continuous torrent of 100 danmaku bullets per burst in a wide cone. Lasts 15 seconds.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.danmaku_br: %1$s was shredded by %2$s's danmaku breath using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.multi_eldritch_bl: Fires 200 independent Eldritch Blasts per second from random positions within a fan-shaped area around you, all converging on your target. Lasts 20 seconds.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.multi_eldr: %1$s was annihilated by %2$s's multi eldritch blast
%1$s was annihilated by %2$s's multi eldritch blast using %3$s
item.elementmagicboss.spell_level_ring.d: All spell levels +10 and max mana +5000 while equipped.
spell.elementmagicboss.enchant_synthesis: Consume an enchanted book from your off-hand and merge all its enchantments onto your main-hand item. Ignores level caps and incompatibility restrictions.
ui.elementmagicboss.enchant_synthesis_in: Merges off-hand book enchants onto main-hand item
message.elementmagicboss.enchant_synthes: Off-hand must hold an enchanted book.
Main-hand must hold an item or enchanted book.
The off-hand book has no enchantments.
spell.elementmagicboss.enchant_separatio: Extract all enchantments from your main-hand item into an enchanted book in your off-hand. The original item loses its enchantments.
ui.elementmagicboss.enchant_separation_i: Extracts enchants from main-hand to off-hand book
message.elementmagicboss.enchant_separat: Main-hand must hold an enchanted item.
Off-hand must be empty to receive the enchanted book.
The main-hand item has no enchantments.
spell.elementmagicboss.trident_bomb.guid: Hurl an enchanted magic trident that explodes on impact, scattering 500 tridents in all directions. Tridents ignore invincibility frames.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.trident_bo: %1$s was skewered by %2$s's trident bomb using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.frost_beam.guide: Channel a continuous Ray of Frost beam that strikes 10 times per tick, ignoring invincibility frames. Targets are frozen for 10 seconds on hit.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.frost_beam: %1$s was flash-frozen by %2$s's frost beam using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.arrow_storm.guide: A True Blazing Storm variant using magic arrows. Fires 20 magic arrows every 5 ticks in a shotgun spread, ignoring invincibility frames.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.arrow_stor: %1$s was riddled by %2$s's arrow storm using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.slash_barrier.gui: Generate a field of invisible slashes within 20 blocks. Strikes all enemies 20 times per tick for 30 seconds, ignoring invincibility frames.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.slash_barr: %1$s was shredded by %2$s's slash barrier using %3$s
Fire a magic missile that creates a massive black hole on impact. Radius 30 blocks, strikes 50 times per tick, ignoring invincibility frames.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.hyper_blac: %1$s was consumed by %2$s's hyper black hole
%1$s was consumed by %2$s's hyper black hole using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.damage_multiply.g: Curse a target, multiplying all damage they receive. Higher levels increase the multiplier; level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.damage_mul: %1$s was made fragile by %2$s's damage multiply
%1$s was made fragile by %2$s's damage multiply using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.freeze_multiply.g: Curse a target, increasing freeze time and multiplying freeze damage received. Also slows movement by 80%. Higher levels increase the multiplier; level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.freeze_mul: %1$s was frozen solid by %2$s's freeze multiply
%1$s was frozen solid by %2$s's freeze multiply using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.curse_of_bleeding: Curses a target's blood, inflicting the Curse of Bleeding debuff. While moving, they take continuous damage and cannot regenerate. Grants you the Vampire buff, healing you for 200% of damage dealt.
spell.elementmagicboss.effect_multiply.g: Curse a target so all debuffs they receive last longer. Higher levels increase the multiplier; level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.effect_mul: %1$s suffered too long under %2$s's effect multiply
%1$s suffered too long under %2$s's effect multiply using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.sure_hit.guide: Curse a target with Sure Hit. All nearby projectiles, including the target's own shots, are dragged toward them with overwhelming holy homing power. Level and spell power increase duration.
spell.elementmagicboss.eternal_fire.guid: Curse a target with Eternal Fire. While cursed, any ignition causes them to burn for 2147483647 ticks and they cannot be extinguished. Fire damage is also amplified by level (Lv1=x2.0, Lv2=x2.5...).
death.attack.elementmagicboss.eternal_fi: %1$s was burned forever by %2$s's eternal fire
%1$s was burned forever by %2$s's eternal fire using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.fire_frying_pan.g: Summon a floating magic frying pan above the target for 20 seconds. Every 5 ticks it sprays 100 fiery danmaku shots in random parabolic arcs, creating a blazing fountain that spreads out while still raining near the target.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.fire_fryin: %1$s was roasted beneath %2$s's fire frying pan
%1$s was roasted beneath %2$s's fire frying pan using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.magic_impact.guid: Call down a colossal cross of holy light at the targeted ground for 2 minutes. While it stands, all enemies within 100 blocks are continuously blasted by sacred damage. Any living thing slain by it becomes a small cross of light and ascends.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.magic_impa: %1$s was reduced to life soup by %2$s's magic impact
%1$s was reduced to life soup by %2$s's magic impact using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.googol_slash.guid: An enhanced Slash Barrier. Generates 2147483647-damage slashes within a 20-block radius every tick. Higher levels increase hits per tick (Lv1=10, Lv10=100). Lasts 60 seconds.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.googol_sla: %1$s was shredded by %2$s's googol slash using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.accumulating_pois: Curse a target so poison effects stack instead of being overwritten. Each new poison application adds to the existing duration. Poison damage is multiplied by level; level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.accumulati: %1$s was slowly eaten away by %2$s's accumulating poison
%1$s was slowly eaten away by %2$s's accumulating poison using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.divine_blessing.g: Grant yourself the Divine Blessing buff. While active, all healing received and damage dealt are multiplied. Higher levels increase the multiplier; level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.divine_ble: %1$s was slain by %2$s blessed by divine power
%1$s was slain by %2$s blessed by divine power using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.true_root_binding: An enhanced Root. Roots all entities within a 20-block radius. Level and spell power increase duration.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_root_: %1$s was held in place by %2$s's true root binding
%1$s was held in place by %2$s's true root binding using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.true_predator.gui: An enhanced Devour. Summons a DevourJaw on every entity within a 20-block radius. Deals 2x Devour's damage.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_preda: %1$s was devoured by %2$s's true predator using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.poison_arrow_stor: The Poison Arrow version of Flying Blood Slash. Fires 10 Poison Arrows per tick in all directions for 10 seconds. Each arrow spawns a poison cloud on impact.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.poison_arr: %1$s was riddled by %2$s's poison arrow storm
%1$s was riddled by %2$s's poison arrow storm using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.ice_afterimage.gu: Grant yourself the Ice Afterimage buff. While active, moving spawns a Frost Step ice clone at your previous position every 5 ticks. Each clone shatters after 3 seconds, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.ice_afteri: %1$s was surrounded by %2$s's ice afterimages using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.limit_break.guide: Grant yourself the Limit Break buff. While active, cast time reduction, cooldown reduction, and mana regen are all maximized.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.limit_brea: %1$s was slain while %2$s was in Limit Break
%1$s was slain while %2$s was in Limit Break using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.danmaku_rain.guid: The Starfall of danmaku. Rains water bullets from the sky that ignore invincibility frames. Targets hit are afflicted with Wet, greatly reducing spell resist, ice magic resist, and lightning magic resist for 30 seconds.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.danmaku_ra: %1$s was drenched by %2$s's danmaku rain using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.crimson_young_moo: Summon a giant crimson moon 10 blocks above you for 20 seconds. Every 5 ticks it releases 100 crimson danmaku bullets in random directions. The bullets ignore gravity, fly straight, and heal you for 200% of the damage they deal.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.crimson_yo: %1$s was overwhelmed by %2$s's overwhelming charisma using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.the_world.guide: Stop time for 10 seconds while you remain free to move. During the stop, 500 magic arrows are arranged around the target and then launched all at once when time resumes.
%1$s was pierced by %2$s's The World using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.mesh_of_light_and: A faithful port of Yukari's laser spell card. Fix your aim and weave crossing red and blue lasers for 6 seconds, then release a red bubble/mentos burst at 20 ticks and a blue burst at 40 ticks. Both lasers and danmaku deal 60% spell power damage and ignore invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.scarlet_meister.g: A faithful port of Remilia's item spell card. For 20 ticks, it sweeps forward and continuously fires red bubble, mentos, and ball danmaku in a rotating scarlet barrage. Each hit deals 60% spell power damage and ignores invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.clownpiece.guide: Based on youkaishomecoming:spell_clownpiece. Fires danmaku for 6 seconds (Phase 0 & 1, 3s each). Phase 0: 3 pairs of blue laser sweep bullets + red fan spreads. Phase 1: 1 wide-angle pair of red laser sweeps + blue fan spreads.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.clownpiece: %1$s was consumed by %2$s's clownpiece danmaku using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.ultimate_eater.gu: Enhanced Gluttony. Mana recovery from eating is 3x Gluttony's rate, and healing received is tripled. Lasts 90 seconds.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.ultimate_e: %1$s was devoured by %2$s's ultimate eater using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.innate_dream.guid: Target an enemy and unfold three converging rings of dream bullets in sequence. Each circle closes in on the target and every hit deals 60% spell power damage while ignoring invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.master_spark.guid: Fire an overwhelming golden master spark forward, then shower the area with stars and sparks. The beam and all follow-up bullets each deal 60% spell power damage and ignore invincibility frames.
Release three delayed five-point star patterns that pause briefly and then accelerate outward. Every spark deals 60% spell power damage and ignores invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.midnight_chorus_m: Sweep a huge rotating chorus of green mentos bullets across the battlefield. Every projectile deals 60% spell power damage and ignores invincibility frames.
Spin eight red and blue lasers around yourself in a shifting lie-detector web. Every laser hit deals 60% spell power damage and ignores invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.double_black_deat: Unleash twin swarms of cyan and magenta butterflies that halt, orbit, and surge again in a deadly net. Every butterfly hit deals 60% spell power damage and ignores invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.acid_storm.guide: A continuous Nature spell that unleashes Acid Orbs in every direction for 10 seconds. Every 5 ticks it fires 12-16 orbs using Acid Orb rend behavior and ignores invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.poison_splash_sto: After a long cast, create a 20-block storm field at the targeted location. Poison Splash erupts repeatedly across the area, and level and spell power increase duration.
spell.elementmagicboss.true_starfall.gui: A strengthened Starfall that rains comets over a 30-block target area. Duration and damage are three times normal Starfall, with dense meteor waves and invincibility-frame ignoring damage.
spell.elementmagicboss.danmaku_meister.g: A Scarlet Meister variant that fires six-color danmaku. When a bullet hits a block or entity, it unfolds 26 all-direction lasers in 45-degree steps. Bullets and lasers ignore invincibility frames.
spell.elementmagicboss.true_chain_lightn: A devastating chain lightning that arcs 10 times more than normal Chain Lightning and deals double damage.
spell.elementmagicboss.invincibility.gui: Grant yourself the Invincibility buff. Every 9 seconds, applies powerful buffs including Abyssal Shroud, Echoing Strikes, Oakskin, Spider Aspect, and more for 10 seconds each.
spell.elementmagicboss.void_strike.guide: Grant yourself the Void Strike buff. While active, all your attacks deal void damage, bypassing armor and enchantments.
spell.elementmagicboss.dragon_skin.guide: Grant yourself Dragon Skin. Reduces all incoming damage by 75% and increases spell resistance by 100%.
spell.elementmagicboss.mass_break_hammer: Destroys all blocks of the same type as your target within a radius. Works on wood, ores, and more.
spell.elementmagicboss.anti_heal.guide: Inflict Anti-Heal on a target. While cursed, any healing they receive is converted into equivalent damage instead.
spell.elementmagicboss.resource_detectio: Detects ores and storage blocks within 50 blocks and makes them glow for 30 seconds.
spell.elementmagicboss.shoes_of_determin: Summon floating shoe entities around you that deal contact damage. Grants Speed V while active.
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_arrow: %1$s was pierced by %2$s's true arrow volley
%1$s was pierced by %2$s's true arrow volley using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.mesh_of_li: %1$s was caught in %2$s's mesh of light and darkness
%1$s was caught in %2$s's mesh of light and darkness using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.scarlet_me: %1$s was overwhelmed by %2$s's Scarlet Meister using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.acid_storm: %1$s was dissolved by %2$s's acid storm using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.poison_spl: %1$s was drowned in %2$s's poison splash storm
%1$s was drowned in %2$s's poison splash storm using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_starf: %1$s was crushed by %2$s's true starfall using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.danmaku_me: %1$s was erased by %2$s's danmaku meister using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.innate_dre: %1$s was sealed inside %2$s's innate dream using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.master_spa: %1$s was vaporized by %2$s's master spark using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.inherited_: %1$s was offered to %2$s's inherited ritual using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.midnight_c: %1$s was swallowed by %2$s's midnight chorus using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.double_bla: %1$s was trapped in %2$s's double black death butterfly
%1$s was trapped in %2$s's double black death butterfly using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.apostle_be: %1$s was purified by %2$s's apostle beam using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.abyss_blas: %1$s was erased by %2$s's abyss blast using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.chain_chai: %1$s was blown apart by %2$s's chain chain creeper
%1$s was blown apart by %2$s's chain chain creeper using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.true_chain: %1$s was overloaded by %2$s's true chain lightning
%1$s was overloaded by %2$s's true chain lightning using %3$s
death.attack.elementmagicboss.shoes_of_d: %1$s was kicked down by %2$s's shoes of determination
%1$s was kicked down by %2$s's shoes of determination using %3$s
spell.elementmagicboss.weather_control.g: Cycles the weather through Clear, Rain, and Thunder in order.
spell.elementmagicboss.sun_reversal: Great Sky Magic: Sun Reversal Formula
spell.elementmagicboss.rare_drop_guarant: While active, all rare drops from mobs are guaranteed to drop.
spell.elementmagicboss.breeding_blessing: Forces all breedable animals within 20 blocks to enter love mode, grow up, and become tamed.
spell.elementmagicboss.healing_determina: Summon 6 orbiting hearts and gain the Healing Determination buff. Recovers HP, mana, food, and saturation every second.
spell.elementmagicboss.slime_block_spell: Hurl a slime block projectile. On hit, applies Slowness V and Poison V for 3 minutes.
spell.elementmagicboss.bloom.guide: Inflict the Bloom curse on a target. Deals 6 damage per second. If the target dies while cursed, an oak tree grows from the death location.
spell.elementmagicboss.crystal_heal.guid: Summon a healing crystal with 50 HP that restores your health every second. Multiple crystals stack.
spell.elementmagicboss.fantasy_seal.guid: Target an enemy and fire 7 homing yin-yang balls. The first hit applies Seal (attack -50%, healing -50%, mana regen -50%, spell resist -50%) for 30s. Caster gains Musou buff (+50% all stats) for 30s.
spell.elementmagicboss.torch_place.guide: Place a torch at the targeted surface up to 100 blocks away.
spell.elementmagicboss.glowstone_place.g: Place a glowstone at the targeted surface up to 100 blocks away.
